title: biscutella auriculata var. lamarckii
intro: Biscutella auriculata var. lamarckii, also known as Lamarck's biscutella, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Biscutella auriculata var. lamarckii, including infusions, teas, and decoctions, have been used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
